certificateDesc: Track public and internal certificate pressure separately from heartbeat freshness so renewal risk remains visible.
emptyCertificatesDetail: Registered public and internal certificates are listed here.
certificateSearchPlaceholder: Search by owner, type, provider, or ID
noMatchingCertificatesDetail: Adjust the current search or filters to see matching certificates.
heartbeatDesc: Filter by derived state, inspect listener and certificate summaries, and watch policy attachment drift per node.
loadingNodeHealthDetail: Heartbeat and node registry data are loading.
emptyNodeHealthDetail: Node-agent heartbeat reports are listed here.
heartbeatSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, id, mode, scope, policy, or listener
noMatchingHealthDetail: Adjust the current query or filters to see matching heartbeat rows.
loadingHistoryDetail: Loading health history for selected node.
emptyHistoryDetail: No heartbeat history available for this node in the last 24 hours.
healthyHeartbeatsDesc: Nodes reporting normal listener and cert state.
staleHeartbeatsDesc: Last heartbeat older than the configured freshness window.
unreportedNodesDesc: Registered nodes that have never sent a heartbeat row.
certificatePressureDesc: Certificates marked rotate, renew-soon, failed, or otherwise non-healthy.
loadingDistributionDetail: Loading health data for distribution chart.
emptyDistributionDetail: No health data available for distribution chart.
historySelected: Heartbeat history for the selected node over the last 24 hours.
historySelectPrompt: Select a node to view its heartbeat history.
selectNodeTrend: Select a specific node from the dropdown above to view its 24-hour heartbeat trend.
